name: Bus Simulator Offroad
short_description: master the art of offroad bus driving and take on the most extreme terrains. from steep mountain trails to dense jungle paths, every route challenges your skill and precision. navigate harsh weather, tricky slopes, and rugged roads as you prove yourself as a true offroad driving pro bus driver.
detailed_description:
Bus simulator offroad

Bus Simulator Offroad is a realistic offroad bus driving game where every journey tests your control, patience, and decision making. Drive heavy buses through rough terrain, narrow mountain roads, forests, and muddy tracks while handling real bus duties.

This game focuses on realistic driving and bus management. You must refuel, change tyres, wash your bus, and safely transport passengers through challenging routes. Rainy roads and night drives add extra difficulty and make every mission feel different.

Core Gameplay

• Drive buses on challenging offroad routes
• Transport passengers safely to their destinations
• Handle rain and night driving conditions
• Park correctly and complete mission objectives

Bus Services and Management

• Refuel your bus at fuel stations
• Change tyres after rough terrain damage
• Wash your bus after muddy drives
• All services available at service areas

key features:

  • Realistic Offroad Driving

    Feel the weight and power of your bus as you drive through challenging offroad terrain. Realistic driving physics react to the road surface, weather, and speed. Every turn, slope, and uneven path requires careful control. Experience authentic steering, braking, engine response, and bus handling throughout your journey.

  • Diverse Environments

    Drive through dense jungles, forest roads, and narrow mountain paths. Each environment offers different challenges, from slippery muddy tracks to rocky uphill routes. Terrain variety keeps every mission fresh and demands different driving strategies.

  • Passenger Transport

    Driving is not the only task. You must safely transport passengers through dangerous routes while maintaining control of the bus. Smooth driving and careful handling help ensure passengers reach their destination safely and on time.

  • Challenging Routes and Missions

    Each route presents unique objectives and difficulties. Complete long distance passenger trips, navigate tricky offroad paths, and overcome natural obstacles. Progress through missions and unlock new routes as you improve your driving skills.

  • Realistic Weather

    Rain and night driving change visibility and road grip, making familiar routes more challenging. Adjust your driving style to match changing conditions and stay focused during difficult journeys.

  • Immersive Sound Design

    Enjoy detailed sound effects that bring the environment to life. From engine noise to tyres rolling over gravel and mud, sound plays an important role in creating a realistic driving experience.

  • Bus Services and Maintenance

    Manage your bus during long trips by refuelling, changing tyres, and washing it at service areas.

  • Scenic and Challenging Landscapes

    Explore visually rich locations with forests, hills, and mountains. Scenic views combine with difficult roads to create a balanced mix of beauty and challenge.

Offroad Route Driving

Drive your bus across open roads and uneven terrain where control and balance are key to reaching the destination safely.

Refuelling at Fuel Station

Stop at fuel stations to refill your bus and prepare for long offroad journeys through challenging routes.

Bus Washing System

Clean your bus after muddy and rainy drives to keep it ready for the next mission.

Tyre Change Service Area

Replace damaged or worn tyres at service areas after driving on rough and rocky terrain.

Passenger Transport Mission

Pick up passengers and carefully drive them through offroad routes to safely reach their destination.

In Cabin Driving View

Experience offroad driving from inside the bus cabin, with full control visibility and realistic road conditions ahead.

 High Altitude Routes

Drive along steep mountain roads where control and balance matter the most.

Realistic Weather Driving

Rain changes road grip and visibility, making every drive more challenging and realistic.

Open Road Journeys

Cruise through long paved routes surrounded by natural landscapes and open skies.

Get ready for the adventure in bus simulator offroad! take the wheel of powerful bus through challenging terrains. with realistic physics and environments, this game will test your driving skills like never before. conquer the toughest roads and prove yourself as the ultimate off-road bus driver.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Indonesian, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Swedish, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese
